issues.title: Will `returnDirect = true` effect in mcp server?
issues.body: `@Tool(returnDirect = true)` did not take effect in the MCP service. It still returned the model's response.

comments.body:
I don't think it's working so far, you can refer to my comment under another issue with the same report: 
https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/issues/3481#issuecomment-2955636384
There have been some new developments on the issue and we can keep an eye on it in #3481
Closing this as duplicate as there have been some ongoing conversations in #3481 as pointed by @sunyuhan1998.

labels.name: duplicate
labels.description: This issue or pull request already exists
